repos.name: .github
repos.description: Organization-level community health defaults (license, contributing, code of conduct, security, issue/PR templates) and shared AI-assistant guidance.

repos.name: Baton
repos.description: Org orchestration: reusable CI/CD workflows, cross-repo automation scripts, Dependabot templates, the repository catalog, and the simulation landing page.

repos.name: DopplerEffect
repos.description: Interactive simulation of the Doppler Effect — visualizes how the frequency of sound waves shifts with relative motion between source and observer.

repos.name: ElectricFieldOfDreams
repos.description: SceneryStack port of the PhET 'Electric Field of Dreams' simulation. Place charged particles and observe Coulomb interactions and an adjustable uniform external field.

repos.name: ExtrasolarPlanets
repos.description: Interactive simulation of two exoplanet-detection methods — radial velocity (Doppler wobble) and transit (light-curve dip).

repos.name: LadyBug
repos.description: SceneryStack port of the PhET 'Ladybug Motion 2D' simulation. Explore 2D motion, position, velocity, and acceleration using a ladybug on a rotating platform.

repos.name: LunarLander
repos.description: SceneryStack port of the classic PhET Flash 'Lunar Lander' simulation. Pilot a lunar module to a soft landing by managing thrust and tilt against gravity.

repos.name: MazeGame
repos.description: SceneryStack port of the PhET 'Maze Game' simulation. Drive a particle through tile-based mazes using position, velocity, or acceleration control modes.

repos.name: MovingMan
repos.description: SceneryStack port of the PhET Java 'Moving Man' simulation. Explore 1D kinematics by dragging a man or using position/velocity/acceleration sliders.

repos.name: OpticsLab
repos.description: Web-based geometric optics simulation. Supports ray sources, parallel and divergent beams, mirrors, lenses, beam splitters, and refraction interfaces.

repos.name: OscillationsAndChaos
repos.description: Collection of four classical mechanics simulations exploring oscillations and chaos: single spring, double spring, pendulum, and double pendulum.

repos.name: QubitSketch
repos.description: Drag-and-drop quantum circuit builder with a live state simulator. Place quantum gates and watch probabilities, amplitudes, Bloch spheres, and measurements update in real time.

repos.name: RadioWaves
repos.description: SceneryStack port of the PhET 'Radio Waves & Electromagnetic Fields' simulation, rebuilt from the legacy PIXI.js + Backbone version. Wiggle an electron and watch EM radiation propagate.

repos.name: Resonance
repos.description: Interactive simulation of resonance in driven oscillating systems. Visualizes driven mass-spring systems and Chladni plate patterns.

repos.name: RotatingSky
repos.description: SceneryStack port of the NAAP 'Rotating Sky' lab. Explore how the sky appears to rotate for an observer on Earth through a horizon system, a celestial sphere, and a combined interactive explorer.

repos.name: TemplateSingleSim
repos.description: Reusable single-screen SceneryStack simulation template with Vite, TypeScript, Biome, PWA support, and i18n scaffolding.

repos.name: TheRamp
repos.description: SceneryStack port of the PhET Java 'The Ramp' simulation. Explore forces on an inclined plane with friction, energy conservation, and applied forces. Features record/playback, force charts, and comparison objects.

repos.name: TrackLab
repos.description: Browser-based video motion-analysis tool. Load a video, calibrate real-world distances, and auto-track objects across frames using computer vision.

repos.name: VariableStarPhotometry
repos.description: SceneryStack port of the NAAP 'Variable Star Photometry' lab. Register CCD star-field images, blink-compare epochs, perform aperture photometry, and find periods from a differential-magnitude light curve.

repos.name: WaveComposer
repos.description: Three-screen VoceVista-style real-time voice-analysis simulation. Analyzes microphone input for waveform, spectrum, and composition.

repos.name: jscd48
repos.description: JavaScript library for controlling the CD48 Coincidence Counter via the Web Serial API. Published to npm.

repos.name: tscd48
repos.description: TypeScript library for controlling the CD48 Coincidence Counter via the Web Serial API. Published to npm.

repos.name: pycd48
repos.description: Python library for controlling the CD48 Coincidence Counter via USB serial. Supports Linux, macOS, and Windows.

repos.name: pyro
repos.description: Browser-based VPython editor using CodeMirror 6 and GlowScript VPython 3.2. Write and run VPython code in the browser with live 3D visualization.
